name: Md. Moinuddin Kamal
title: Senior IT Administrator & Junior Full Stack Developer
tagline: Bridging Infrastructure Excellence with AI-Driven Automation & Web Development
bio: Results-driven IT Administrator and Junior Full Stack Developer with 12+ years of hands-on experience in network management, system administration, and web development. Skilled in Windows Server, Cisco/MikroTik networks, and Odoo ERP, while proficient in Django, React, and Node.js for full-stack solutions. Strong problem-solver with a track record of optimizing IT operations and developing efficient web applications. Passionate about integrating DevOps practices to enhance system reliability and automation.

experience.description: Architected and maintained a multi-vendor IT ecosystem including printers, scanners, and access controllers.
achievements: Achieved 99.5% uptime across multi-vendor IT ecosystem
Engineered MikroTik-based LAN/MAN/WAN solutions supporting 250+ users with Winbox management
Deployed Cisco network infrastructure reducing troubleshooting time by 40%
Implemented firewall policies and VPN solutions decreasing security incidents by 60%
Spearheaded Windows Server 2016 deployment with Active Directory, DNS, DHCP serving 300+ endpoints
Customized Odoo ERP modules enhancing HR/finance workflow efficiency by 35%
Automated payroll/attendance systems reducing processing errors by 45%
Led full lifecycle web application development using Django/React

experience.description: Managed fiber network design and enterprise IT infrastructure.
achievements: Planned and configured OLT systems for 40% bandwidth improvement
Deployed 50+ MikroTik routers with Winbox reducing downtime by 35%
Managed 200+ endpoints cutting security incidents by 70%
Led 5-member teams to achieve 99% SLA compliance
Upgraded systems to boost efficiency by 50%

experience.description: Provided IT support and automated business processes.
achievements: Automated attendance tracking and payroll processing reducing errors by 30%
Delivered IT support for 150+ users resolving 95% of tickets within SLA
Deployed CCTV surveillance systems with remote monitoring capabilities

experience.description: Managed cloud-based ERP platforms and IT infrastructure.
achievements: Managed cloud-based ERP platforms (Enjazit, Alkawder) for 100+ users ensuring 99.9% uptime
Resolved IT/PC hardware/software issues with 90% first-call resolution rate
Automated routine troubleshooting processes reducing ticket resolution time by 35%
Implemented standardized PC deployment protocols cutting setup time by 50%

experience.description: Managed Oracle Database systems and provided enterprise IT support.
achievements: Managed Oracle Database systems (8i/9i/10g) optimizing performance for 50+ concurrent users
Resolved critical IT issues with 95% first-call resolution rate across 120+ endpoints
Streamlined database maintenance processes reducing backup times by 40%
Diagnosed hardware failures cutting replacement costs by 25%
Developed user training manuals decreasing repeat support tickets by 30%
